payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: So, anyway, last we left off, Vox Machina, in facing the terrible threat of Vecna returned to physical form, sent you all through this conflict to seek audiences with a number of the deities of Exandria. After getting blessings and fragments of the essence of three of the gods, you discovered that Vecna had completed the Ritual of Seeding and ascended into godhood. However, discussing with Ioun, the Knowing Mistress, it will take a little bit of time for him to both understand the extent of his power, to claim his domains, and expand beyond his current condensed avatar form, so time is of the essence. Not to mention that in order to claim the full strength, there needs to be a showing of power and faith to gather attention and faith from the masses. So with that information, you also imbued upon Grog the ability to blacksmith and Percival the knowledge of the construct of these Divine Trammels, things that could possibly be used to seal and have been used previously to seal a god as killing them is a very difficult and dangerous thing. Retrieving this information, you discovered that the place where these can be crafted is called the Core Anvil. Once belonging to the All-Father, the deity of construction, design and craftsmanship, it resides beneath an underwater volcano known as Scaldseat, off the shore of a city called Shorecomb in Issylra. You also had a fantastic little run-in with Vecna, recently, taunting you all. Last we left off, you had found yourself in Vasselheim, went to the Trial Forge to speak with Earthbreaker Groon, discovered what would be required to attempt to make contact with Kord, and you made communion with the Raven Queen, and in declaring your complete faith in her she offered a piece of her essence to give you the third seed with which to make a third Divine Trammel, and with you all falling asleep within Scanlan's Magnificent Mansion, you cast True Polymorph on yourself to take the form of a planetar and did whatever you did in that form as you all went to sleep that evening.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Once a year, y'all. Once a year.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Travis Willingham, happy birthday, buddy.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Happy birthday, bb!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I can't die today, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Where's the cake?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's in my stomach.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: There's no cake, y'all.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: But where's the cake?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I mean, that was awesome.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I have a little cake eraser. Do you want the cake eraser for the game? Hang on. Where is it? Where did I put it? Happy birthday!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's a little Pike cake!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And on that, enjoy your cake. And let's bring us into tonight's episode of Critical Role. [dramatic music]

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And welcome back.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We didn't say anything.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, you didn't. I was waiting and there was absolute silence. Wow. This is what it's like to have respect. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: 107 episodes later.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's all it took. And it's the last time it'll ever happen.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Lulling you into a false sense of security.

payload.raw_text: Okay. Both of you curl up and fall asleep. The morning comes. You all come to consciousness within Scanlan's Magnificent Mansion. And find breakfast of various grains and oats and quinoa.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: Hey, I'm fucking cold. Will you give me a hug?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: Yeah. It's the weirdest thing, by the way, you being cold. I mean, it's just something to get used to.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: I don't have any clever closer. I'm just going to crawl into bed and go to sleep.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All right, so as you finish your meals in the morning, prepare yourself for the actions of the coming day, what do you wish to do?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Lentils.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What do you mean lentils? What is that? What is a lentil? Is it a leaf? Is it a bean?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No one really knows, to be fair.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Why on god's green earth is it even here? I don't understand.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Lentils are here to punish us.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Really?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yes. We have done something terribly wrong, and now we must eat of these.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That makes sense an hour from now when I get punished in the loo.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We are punished by that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm sorry. This head cold mixed with crying is bad.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It gets you, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it's rough.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, that's what happened to me that day.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's the worst!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, your voice is super sexy tonight, so that's good.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (raspy singing) Smelly cat, smelly cat--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (raspy singing) What are they feeding you?

payload.raw_text: Yes. That's the maximum of your hit points for the next 24 hours, so keep that in mind, folks.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns_last5.text: We'll take a slightly early break in the long run.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: That's lucky. Okay, so there you go. That's 18 additional hit points.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Yes. That's the maximum of your hit points for the next 24 hours, so keep that in mind, folks.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No lentils, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There is a bowl of lentils for those who may want it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I had some. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so as the Heroes' Feast says here--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Immune to fear and poison and advantage on wisdom checks.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And you roll 2d10 extra.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Wisdom saving throws.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to roll 2d10 for you guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do you guys want food now, or do you want to wait until the break?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Let's wait until the break.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We'll take a slightly early break in the long run.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Whoa! Two nines! (cheering)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's lucky. Okay, so there you go. That's 18 additional hit points.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That can regenerate?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Inspiring Leader. A creature can't gain temporary hit points from this feat again until it has finished a short or long rest. So you have temporary hit points until your next long rest, essentially.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I had some. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes. That's the maximum of your hit points for the next 24 hours, so keep that in mind, folks.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, dope!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How long do your inspiring speeches last?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that is an excellent question. How long do my speeches--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Said Kathleen Turner.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Said Harvey Fierstein. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Said Katharine Hepburn.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Okay, this'll only last for eight hours, so travel quickly."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Pike? You know you have-- what's it called you put on me one time? That Death Ward? Should we put that on one of us before we go, just in case it's super dangerous? One of the squishier ones? Does someone want Death Ward, so if you go down--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Put it on Vax.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, no.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I think either Percy or I.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Pass.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh god, just kiss already!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We do.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh god! They do.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Boulder-Parchment-Shears. Perfect opportunity.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Flip for it. Heads or tails?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Boulder-Parchment-Shears.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, come on.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Boulder-Parchment-Shears?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: One time. One, two, three, go!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Boulder always wins.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I can give it to a few people." (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Thanks, Pike! That's convenient.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "That's going to tap out my spells there. I'm going to have to save some for Sending, just in case."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes, of course.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Those two.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Mr. and Mrs. de Rolo.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Three days' rental including a crew on board. That'll run you approximately 150 gold pieces. I require, to be in case you lose the ship or don't return with it, an additional 500 to hold in case you lose the ship. So a grand total of 650 up front with 500 to be returned upon your return."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We were hoping to charter a ship at great expedience to about five miles off the coast to the plume of smoke and the underwater volcano.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You watch as the one eye, moving independently of the other, glances and looks each of you very quickly up and down and then slicks back into place. "That can be arranged, yes."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Excellent.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "How long would you wish to charter this ship?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Three days?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Sure, yeah, probably be less than that but three days, sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Do you have a crew?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No, we would need to--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Can any of us sail?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Not if we want to live.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We would like to charter a crew also to maintain. We're going to be doing a bit of underwater search and rescue, so.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Very well then."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Will that be possible?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yes."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Great. Wonderful.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Will that be possible?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yes."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Great. Wonderful.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "The crew is included. Go say hello. Hope to see you back in a few days." Whips around and walks her way back.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Shanty's a fancy name for a mansion, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Leads you out to one of the far end docks, and there are a number of decent ships and larger fishing ships, some faster-travel ships, some long boats. You see one galleon-sized ship that's just left and taken away, and on the far end there is one of the shittiest tugboat-sized boats you've seen in a while. Scanlan, you've seen boats like this and they're largely used for either relatively cheap and relatively quick messenger services. A courier ship, if you will. That's about it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Do we need a bigger vessel?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I have a feeling you don't believe this ship will make it back, do you?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well, that would not behoove me; I wish to keep my ships at dock where they're safe."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Of course. Yep.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: She's got a high-ass insurance policy on this bitch.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Clever.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Actually, yeah, that's a good point. But if Danny DeVito also was doing Iron Man competitions for a number of years and then let himself go, so he has the bulk of the muscle underneath but then-- Yeah. Doesn't say a word, just looks at you all and then walks out onto the deck of the ship.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: The Shore Shanty?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. It's a mouthful.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Captain Santy of the Shore Shanty? I love it!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You watch as this large gentleman walks over and slams his fist on this small, wooden-- ugh, my brain isn't working. Thank you, a hatch in the ground. "We've got customers." And you hear this rustling beneath and all of a sudden the hatch slams up, and barreling out from underneath you see the drunkest, most unshaven, unwashed, gnarled goliath you've ever seen. No facial hair, but bits of frizzled dark hair in the back, which is interesting. Very few goliaths grow hair. Now what's interesting about this, too, is the size isn't as large as you height-wise, but width is about matching yours, so this is a bowling ball of a goliath. Steps up on the top. (grunts)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Only taller.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: A large Danny DeVito.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Well, one of the two older gentlemen that were there, the one that knocked on the hatch, goes, (hums). Sticks his hand out the side of the doorway, "Maybe two hours? Three hours?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Only taller.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: A large Danny DeVito.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Actually, yeah, that's a good point. preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Great.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can I look down into the hatch where he came from? Can I see anything?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a perception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We're just going from point A to point B. This is just what we need.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Two.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It is dark, but you can smell the rum.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: There's rum down there. Down there? There is rum.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Well, we have five miles ahead of us.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Let's get shit-housed. Who cares what our responsibilities are?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How long would it take to go five miles on this fabulous ship?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All right. As you set sail, the wind picks up, speed is enhanced and you gather at this rate probably in under two hours you'll probably make it to the destination with the help of the Air Ashari--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: After all, we are going on a three-hour tour.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Actually, it should be only about half an hour, now!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ooh! There's sound effects, first of all. Appreciate the sound effects. If we're going on a three-hour tour, I demand to know who's Gilligan, who's the Skipper, millionaire and his wife. The movie star--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Ginger.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ginger, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Well, then there's the Professor and Mary Ann. Yeah. Well, you may be the Professor. So maybe you're Mary Ann. Does that make me Ginger?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, wait. Wouldn't you be Thurston Howell III?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I feel like I would really be Thurston. I feel like Thurston's better.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Actually, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You're Mary Ann, you're Professor.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: This is going to be very helpful against Vecna.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're the crazy monkey on the island that kept fucking shit up.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Little buddy!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You can make out the gist of things, but depending on how fast you're talking, it could be hard to hear. It's getting darker and darker the further down you descend, and the water gets murkier and murkier. It also gets warmer.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He's out. He's swimming.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so Trinket's trying to keep up next to you. Scanlan, where are you?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm probably next to Percy.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so you guys begin making your way down. You can breathe the water just fine as you descend 40, 60 feet, 80 feet.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm equalizing.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You're breathing water. It's not necessary.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Really? Your ears wouldn't pop, still?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: There's no air in your sinuses.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, right. Okay, cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's funny. You mention equalizing, and I can't help but try and do it myself now.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Quick question. Like in space, can we talk underwater if there's no air going through our vocal cords? Cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, good. We can't communicate.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'll say because you have the earring, it's a little garbled, but you can hear it a little bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's like that game we all played when we were growing up.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: About another 20 or so feet, and it's hot enough to stand, but it's getting really uncomfortable, and with Percival's light, you can see the bottom. (soft impact) You guys all land there at the bottom of the ocean. It's so dark that outside of Percival's light and the glow around you, you only see the outline of each other from the splash-back of the light as he projects it around.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Stop peeing, Vax.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (chuckles) I was waiting for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You called him Vex.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Vax, and I said sorry at the same time, so I'm peeing right now, is what I'm saying.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's good. It leads you into it. Descending further and further, the only visible light that you have is the one that Percival is shining below, and as it goes through, you can see it reveals another 40 or so feet ahead of you, and then as you pass over, it suddenly becomes shorter and then longer again as it comes and hits the smoke, and you can see the smoke and the fume now. It's billowing up at a rapid pace, and the water is getting hotter and hotter, to the point where now it's starting to feel like a sauna.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (garbled) We didn't think about fire resistance, did we?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: As you guys are glancing about, for over the next 15 or so minutes, just swimming around and keeping an eye out there, Keyleth, with your glowing hands and cruising across as you head down, you can feel a couple of other small changes in the current. Less of a fume release, more than there is a warmer area of water in a small area and you find there is a pressurized jet of water coming out of one section maybe about 25 to 30 feet down on the side.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: The toppest.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Let's not do that just yet. Let's control current and see if we can fucking do it, with some light this time.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We need a walk. Walk the perimeter

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I mean, we can still walk the perimeter if you want.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I mean, we got a little under 24 hours. Fuck it, let's look.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We can walk the perimeter

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Let's do a little walk of the perimeter, and when we're ready, we're going to jump down and we'll Mary Poppins it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so you guys begin to make your way around, spiraling the outside of this.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Looking, using the light.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, what are you looking for?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm looking for other expelling gasses, interesting plant growth, lights.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Anything that looks not-natural.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, caves.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, everyone who's looking, make an investigation check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Investigation? Natural 20. (cheers)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, minus two. 17.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Ten.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: I'll give you advantage on this because it's a volcano punch.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Is it made out of stone? Can I call this earth? Can I call this rock?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's considered rock. It's volcanic rock.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So Move Earth would not work?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Or Grog can punch it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, Grog can punch.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You are good at destroying structures.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You're going to punch a volcano?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, dirt, sand, or clay, so I'm going to say no.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can I transmute the rock into dirt or sand to give us a little more?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: If you have a means of doing that, you could.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I have Transmute Rock. Or we can let Grog go first.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Let's let Grog punch a volcano.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You want to punch a volcano?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Kind of.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Teach it to say your name!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Roll a strength check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (garbled) Say my name, bitch!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Don't you get advantage?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I do. Only if I'm raging.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You can see fairly, with your elven vision, yeah, and with your dagger. So yeah, you begin to walk on the surface. The surface is cooled, and it's very hot in here. But not painfully so, like when you dove into the caldera itself. You walk down about ten or 15 feet and you see it's now breaking off in various directions. You can see small pockets where it closes off, areas where it looks like whatever air or gases were trapped up when parts of the volcano would expand and pressurize upward, it would trap these areas. But you see areas where liquid rock are spilling into and creating small pools. And it continues to descend, almost like a curved spiral, around the way.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Do your Navy SEAL shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That's fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Come out of the water, eyes open.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: 34? Jesus.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. You think you're pretty stealth.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I think I'm pretty stealth.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You think you're pretty stealth.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I don't like the way he said that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I know!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go upward?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. As you get up, you see a familiar orangeish-red glow, and as you see the surface of water above you, there's another, looks like an air pocket. You emerge. You look about, and it looks like there is another tunnel here, but there's a faint glow. It looks like there are small veins of cooling volcanic rock in this area. The tunnel continues. There's actually ground that you can walk on that continues down and curves out of the way.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: The walls are cooling?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I just turn to the group and I'm going to--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can you see by the light of the magma?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: What would have been 56 damage is reduced to 28 fire damage to you. You pull out real fast. (sizzle, groan) It burns and burns and burns. Kick it off. You keep walking around the curvature, and it takes about two minutes or so of brisk travel to get around the corner where you can see another pool of warm water.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I walk away from her, and I go down the hall.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. It's a decent jump to get over the lava. It's not a hard one, necessarily, but I want you to make an athletics check, anyway.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Ooh, better use one of my Lucks for that. That was a one. Ooh! Six.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Six.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Six. Burn, baby, burn.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Total of six?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, total of six. Already used Luck; it's done.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Why does this always happen to us?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I don't know, but I love it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You run and make a leap, and you're pretty sure you made it, but one foot (sizzle) right into it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Is it the same foot?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's the same foot.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Thankfully, your armor is set to resist.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Okay, that's right. That was early on. Wow.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And yet Vax ain't sweating it. Not anymore.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's nothing you haven't had to regrow before.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Does your Raven Queen regenerate lost footsies?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Yeah. I hope it's better than that. You recognize the shape of the front, especially you, Percival, as you spent some time with a creature of a similar shape.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: The fuck was that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I loved it so much.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's amazing.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. So as the rumbling continues to grow and swell, you all hold yourselves in place. (rumbling, crashing) You hear the crumbling and crashing of stone and rock, as from the side of the hallway, right next to where Grog is standing, maybe about a foot and a half in front of him, you watch some large, pointed object pierce through the wall, maybe about nine feet tall or so, go (explosion) out, sending dust and rock spilling out, and there's a faint orange glow from some smooth, armored head to some large creature with a toothy mouth that opens up and (chomping) as it bites down, you see rows and rows of teeth that are glowing orange, as bits of molten rock are spilling out the sides of the mouth.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's like 2006's The Core!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Well, as none of you have done anything at this point in time, I need you all to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, is it a worm? A purple worm?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, because it has two, big. muscular, trunk-like arms, as it (crash crash) out in front, but it has no eyes. It has the solid, armored front, and heated edges where the plates meet. It seems to be some sort of elemental-infused or variant of the bulette that you encountered before. And as it breaks through and stops, mere inches from Grog-- turn that thing off.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It talks! It's a sentient bulette!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Happy Birthday.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (snarls) Across the way, you hear a low rumble again. (snarls) It stomps the ground. And you watch, from one of the other walls, (explosion) jutting from it, a smaller version. And a second emerges. (explosion) Two children. They both emerge, going (snarls). As you're all standing there, holding perfectly still.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: They can't see us. We'll stand still and we'll be fine, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Jurassic Park rules.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (sniffs)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We could attack them.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: There's three of them!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: One of them turns around, and starts walking slowly towards the direction that Grog is. The large mother. And turns, Grog, and you have to lean back as the nose sweeps past, and is facing right in your direction. You can see these large holes in the front of its armored snout go (sniffing). The mouth slightly cracks open and curls back into what you could almost imagine to be a grin.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can I quietly go into a rage? (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You are not my parents.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: That's an additional six damage. All right, infuriated, it's now starting to stomp in the middle, and as it's hitting, the lava's starting to splash up around it. The babies! This one right here is only going to make a bite attack right now. It can't make a leap because you're too close to it. But as you rush towards it, it seems to sense your presence, and the movement of the wings (wing flap) keeping you aloft. And the baby's going to (snapping) and lash out towards you. That is 18.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oof. Nice. Great, so that one, seeing the glow of the slight crack in the armor that Grog had left, the dagger disappears inside the slight gap, and you see this (spurt) of super hot, thick, viscous blood spill out and hit the side of the rock and then cool and darken as it does across the side of the cavern wall.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And then for movement, watch this shit right here, folks. (counting) 40, because I'm hasted, 45, 50, 55.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There you go.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wow.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I did it my fucking self!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, that ends your turn?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Did it feel weird to have somebody else moving the people?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, it felt awesome. I didn't have to do a damn thing. All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, and Hunter's Mark!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, the Hunter's Mark damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Six!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Well, you have a pretty high con bonus. You could hold your breath for seven minutes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make an investigation check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Nice. Watch me knock this out of the park.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'd say more of a perception check for this. This is less of searching for details.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That's better. Still shitty. 11.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The pathway still continues to descend and curve around, but that's it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: The pathway still continues to descend around.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Wow. Very observant of you, Grog.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Descended around.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Copy that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can we see now because of all the glow coming from-- does magma glow?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Most of you, aside from Percival, can see decently in low light, anyway, or have darkvision.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's only been about 25 seconds, but we do eventually have to breathe.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh. I'll use my chalice.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh yeah. Pass the jug.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What about me?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You, as a planetar, let's see here.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I think I'm dying.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What? Why?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't know. I think I probably need air.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: I'll allow it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, you have a pretty high con bonus. You could hold your breath for seven minutes.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll do that. See how I fare.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do you still have Heroes' Feast?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No, you do.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't think I do. I'm a new body.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No. True Polymorph, you absorb your gear and you don't benefit from it, but it doesn't say anything about you not benefiting from--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Previous spells and bonuses. That's an interesting point.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: The soul is imbued with Heroes' Feast, not the body.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Correct.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Interesting.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: See, it's all there. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: But we're along the path to the water that I saw.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: The gear melds into the new form. The creature cannot activate, use, wield, or otherwise benefit from any of its equipment, but it doesn't say anything else other than equipment.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Thank you, Lindsay Lohan.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You're very welcome.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You glide down your own way. The air is extremely warm as it passes by you. Holding your breath at this point, because you are not near any source of water, it looks like, and you're not carrying one with you. You glide down, rapid speed past the lava, which eventually comes and cools in a clump, a small mound where it seems a recent hole punched out of and began to dribble down. It's been cooling and causing this extra layer on the tunnel. Everything here seems to be in this weird state of flux. You continue past it, and it drops into a tunnel below, maybe about 20 or 30 feet wide. Descends downward.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to cast Detect Evil and then wordlessly speak to you all.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, in our brains? I like it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I say  Brothers and sisters. Allow me to guide us by the spirits of my religious faith down into the depths of this hell place.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: While he's talking, I turn to my sister and go--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Are you still you, Scanlan, just in another body?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes, my child. Inside.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Boners and wangs.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's weird that you're nine feet tall, but your penis is still a cube.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's by choice. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: So you can recognize me if I die in a fight and you have to go to a lab and identify the body, you'll be like (fake crying) oh, it's him!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And they shall know him by his cube.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Sorry. Yes. Lead the way.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Given that case, as soon as you land, you look up and you can see across the rock here, there is one portion of the wall that is smoother than the rest in a concave perfect square across the opposite side. You can see faint runes or glyphs that are pressed into the stone, like part of it has been untouched for quite some time.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Straight down?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Straight down.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll go down a bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You descend about 30 or 40 feet. This cylinder-like tunnel comes to a halt; it stops.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Am I detecting any evil?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You are not detecting any evil, no. Do you have darkvision in this form?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't know! Where does it say?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It says truesight. You don't have darkvision; you have everything vision.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Predator vision.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I can also speak every language!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You get that sense. The forge was made by and for the use of the Allhammer, and the Allhammer is locked somewhere on his own plane across the other side of the Divine Gate and has been for 800 years.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: More of that. All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What? What does it say?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's a "shop's closed," I suppose.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can we reopen it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No indicator of that. It was essentially, (door click) "Key is locked up forever. Bye! Bless this seal."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Bust through this shit or undo it? Do we have a way to cancel the seal out?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So it's quite literally a family business. We're closed, retired. Bars in front of it.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Right, I'm saying for the purposes of the guide being released and you embracing your fate-touched nature and the extremely dutiful adherence to the law of your Raven Queen... sure, I'll give you a fate-touched additional fourth Luck.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) Oh! Ten.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Ten? (sighs) You're not entirely certain of the metal. It is a dark, dull, slate gray. A little darker than that, even, and elements of the edges appear to be almost red. Almost like a rust or ruddy color, but you don't recognize what type of metal it is, necessarily.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm stealthing. I'm stealthing down the steps.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I did cast Pass Without a Trace on all of us again a while ago. I said it. I even marked it off after the fight.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You rolled a natural 20?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yep. Using a Luck. But yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Using Luck. You've used three Lucks today.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Three of my four, according to your campaign guide?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The campaign guide was something that was for other people to use... (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As sort of an inside joke for the previous more than three Lucks.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, that was my third, not my fourth.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: 27, okay. You continue down for about two minutes or so, and even glancing ahead to the edge of your visual range here in the darkness, because there is no light source below at this point... the stairs are continuing and continuing and continuing, and you have no idea how long it'll go for, but you begin to sense as you're walking, and you hear this faint rhythmic, bassy rumble of a low, nearly inaudible, drum-like beat, deeper than any sound you've heard, quaking the ground ever so faintly. (slow, rumbling pulses) And you can very faintly feel it. You get down and move your fingers to the ground, and for the moments before the heat gets there, the next time you hear it, you can feel a very faint vibration, only because you are very perceptive at the moment.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Did one of y'all growl just now? That was you?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That was me.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Or did it come out of the speaker?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You don't know.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That shit scared me. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That shit was too loud from a weird direction. I got all haunted house for a second. I was like, (gasps).

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I cannot wait to get to Halloween Horror Nights with you again.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Travis Willingham's fatal flaw.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm quick as hell. (laughs)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You are quick. That's why we leave you ten feet ahead of us.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You are the best jump scare.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: One of these days you're going to break someone's nose.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I know. Ah! I'm so sorry! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's going to be glorious. Anyway, as you descend the staircase, you ahead, make a perception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: All right. I'm going to use your Pelor die. Hey, that's good. Perception, you say? 27!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You guys are about 20 minutes out, both you and Grog, before you lose your forms.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Is it exactly rhythmic? Precisely?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'd say, with your high perception check, you can tell that yes, it is precisely rhythmic.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I think there's some sort of god-sized machinery ahead of us. I think we're getting close.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Did you lose your earring because you're an angel now?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No, he keeps all his stuff.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't have the earring, but I can talk to you telepathically in any language. How about Italian, darling? (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Stop being creepy, Scanlan.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I sense my hour is coming to an end soon.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Another ten, 15 minutes of descending these stairs that seem to go on and on and on, and you guys are starting to hear this (low rumbling), but it is getting steadily louder the further down you climb, Vax. You begin to see along the metallic walls, occasionally, shapes in the metal. And you glance over, Vax, and look, and you can see, carved from the metal, humanoid, armored warriors standing about ten or so feet tall, larger than normal. Their poses vary. Some of them are on the side, some of them are attacking, some of them are defending, and about every 25 or 30 feet or so, there will be one on one side or the other.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Is it exactly rhythmic? Precisely?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'd say, with your high perception check, you can tell that yes, it is precisely rhythmic.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I think there's some sort of god-sized machinery ahead of us. I think we're getting close.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Did you lose your earring because you're an angel now?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No, he keeps all his stuff.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't have the earring, but I can talk to you telepathically in any language. How about Italian, darling? (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Stop being creepy, Scanlan.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I sense my hour is coming to an end soon.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys are about 20 minutes out, both you and Grog, before you lose your forms.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Do you know binary? One, zero, zero, one, zero, one, one, zero, one, zero, one...

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Speak in Morse code.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Do you guys want to walk around the back of the staircase? As you guys move around the back of the staircase, the wall on the opposite side of that relief contains a third armored warrior relief embedded in the wall. You can see there are four pillars right along the side of where the staircase descends that contain bolted-in, large braziers that contain ever-burning flames, flickering, that give that orange-red glow, similar to the coals you saw embedded in the ground as you arrived. And then on the back side of the staircase and the column that held it aloft, you recognize it immediately, Grog, strangely. Because while you've not cared or understood what these things are before, suddenly you know what it is. You see a large metal-- it looks like a well, almost, but there is a furnace built into it and a number of tools that are hanging to the side, small tongs and heavy leather gauntlets. This is a smelter.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can we see how deep the hole goes?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You'd have to get closer to it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I want to get close to it on my broom and look at it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, you fly up above the coals, and the heat emanating from the coals below you is extremely hot. You can see it warping the air above it, so you have to protect yourself a bit and squint the eyes, and you swear you can smell the scent of burning hair. And you get up close and you can see the relief, perhaps some sort of triangular or pyramid-like shape would slip into it. It looks like all the corners eventually converge to a point on the interior of it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. All right. I back up so that I'm not in the fumes.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Is there anything else in the room besides the two reliefs on either side that we can see? Tools?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: And a moment later, Grog, your form drops as well, and you revert back to normal Grog size. Still massive.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that's where we have to smelt the platinum. Do we see anything around the room that looks like it could fit in that pyramid shape?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to cast, again, Detect Good and Evil, and do a swoop around and see if I sense any creatures or magically consecrated objects.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You swoop around the room. You detect no evil. You detect no magically consecrated objects. And at that point, the spell's about to fade or become permanent.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (sighs) Big choice.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You mean, you'll stay like that forever? You can't undo it?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes, my child. I will drop the spell.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. And with that, a smaller Scanlan form appears, the planetar angelic form vanishing, and he drops about four feet and lands on his feet on the ground.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I feel my back, covered in hair. I'm back.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Yep. (laughs) Two weeks. All right. Have a good night, guys, rest well, thank you for coming, and as always--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Happy birthday!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Happy birthday, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's still for another hour! Thank you, Magic: the Gathering - Puzzle Quest.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, thank you Puzzle Quest, Magic  the Gathering edition for being our fantastic sponsor. Thank you guys for watching. We'll pick up next week, and then after that is GenCon.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) Oh jeez.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So after next week is GenCon, so start getting that ready.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit. Oh my god, we're going right into it.
